hero.headline: Transforming Trauma Insights with AI

definition_section.heading: What is AI Behavioral Assessment?
paragraphs: AI behavioral assessment uses advanced algorithms to evaluate children's emotional and psychological well-being, especially in the context of trauma.
It provides actionable insights to help parents and clinicians create effective support strategies for children with PTSD.

faq.answer: Yes, we prioritize privacy and use secure protocols to protect all data.
